body:
Diff only contains a result.json execution artifact; the actual CommandPalette.svelte changes addressing the three AC items (input border, kbd bg, hover state) are not present in the reviewable diff.
harness=claude
model=opus
input_bytes=4554
output_bytes=821
elapsed_ms=13936

post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)
Diff only contains a result.json execution artifact; the actual CommandPalette.svelte changes addressing the three AC items (input border, kbd bg, hover state) are not present in the reviewable diff.
result_rev=33cc8faf4592df4b0b9db28e54104a699011150c
base_rev=70c37323c16a991ffb358d82a0acff0b4822b2e9

Bead ddx-e1723c99 — no code changes required this pass.

State of CommandPalette.svelte at base-rev aeaa8f1b
---------------------------------------------------
All three AC items are already satisfied in the working tree:

1. Search input border (line 505)
   Current: class="... border-0 bg-transparent ... focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-lever
                  dark:focus:ring-dark-accent-lever ..."
   AC: input should drop the redundant inner border and use focus-ring-only styling.
   Status: matches AC exactly. Outer wrapper (line 498) carries the only border
   (border-b border-border-line); inner input has border-0 + focus ring.

2. kbd background (line 509)
   Current: class="rounded-none border border-border-line bg-bg-surface ...
                  dark:border-dark-border-line dark:bg-dark-bg-surface ..."
   AC: kbd gets bg-bg-surface / dark:bg-dark-bg-surface.
   Status: present.

3. Hover/selected depth pattern (lines 532, 540)
   Current: hover:bg-bg-canvas data-[selected]:bg-bg-canvas
            dark:hover:bg-dark-bg-canvas dark:data-[selected]:bg-dark-bg-canvas
   AC: hover/selected depth pattern documented and consistent with sidebar nav
   (both should use canvas for hover).
   Status: a documenting comment sits above Command.GroupItems (line 532), and
   both states resolve to bg-bg-canvas — consistent with NavShell.svelte, which
   uses hover:bg-bg-canvas across its nav rows.

Why this bead came back with REVIEW:BLOCK
-----------------------------------------
The file change actually landed in commit 4e078e38
("fix(ui): align CommandPalette tokens with sidebar nav pattern [ddx-e1723c99]"),
which is an ancestor of base-rev aeaa8f1b. The reviewer flagged the bead
because the *most recent* execute attempt's reviewable diff contained only
a result.json execution artifact — the .svelte edits were not in that
particular attempt's diff because they had already been merged in a prior
attempt. The state of the source file on disk, however, is correct.

What a follow-up would need
---------------------------
Nothing in the source. If the orchestrator's review step is comparing the
attempt's diff (rather than the file state) against the AC, this bead will
keep re-queuing indefinitely. Two options:

  a) Mark the bead resolved by reference to commit 4e078e38, since the
     three AC items are observably present in the source.
  b) Adjust the review gate so it inspects file state at HEAD, not just
     the diff produced by the latest execute-bead attempt.

Producing a synthetic edit-and-revert just to populate a non-empty diff
would be dishonest and would muddy the file's history; not doing that.
